evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Take full ownership of the stability of our marketing data pipelines — be the first to respond to incidents and drive resolution
evidence.domain_risk: Partner with marketers to automate and improve marketing processes using data
evidence.collaboration_width: data analysts; engineers; software engineers; marketing teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: Maintain expertise across marketing tech stack including ad platforms, Airbyte, Zoho CRM, GTM, and web analytics
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, build, and maintain our core marketing data models — you know them by heart and can answer any question with data within minutes
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Partner with marketers to automate and improve marketing processes using data
evidence.autonomy_level: Define a forward-looking vision for the marketing data stack and drive its development
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design, build, and maintain our core marketing data models

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Take full ownership of the stability of our marketing data pipelines — be the first to respond to incidents and drive resolution
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: The emphasis on stability, incident response, and resolution indicates a rigour-first orientation focused on reliability and data accuracy rather than speed.
domain_risk_quote: Expert-level understanding of growth marketing unit economics: CPL, CAC, blended CPL, ROAS, LTV, and marketing attribution models
domain_risk_reasoning: Marketing attribution models and unit economics (ROAS, LTV) directly affect financial decision-making and revenue attribution.
collaboration_width_teams: data analysts; engineers; software engineers; marketing teams
data_team_maturity_quote: Maintain expertise across marketing tech stack including ad platforms, Airbyte, Zoho CRM, GTM, and web analytics
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Named tools and existing infrastructure signal a growing function with established pipelines, not early-stage; no multi-team scale indicated.
jd_authorship_quote: Design, build, and maintain our core marketing data models — you know them by heart and can answer any question with data within minutes
jd_authorship_reasoning: Core responsibilities specify technical domain (BigQuery, dbt, marketing tech stack, incident response) with enough precision to understand the role's Tuesday morning.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Partner with marketers to automate and improve marketing processes using data
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The role explicitly serves marketing teams with focus on marketing process automation and commercial metrics like CAC, ROAS, and LTV.
autonomy_level_quote: Define a forward-looking vision for the marketing data stack and drive its development
autonomy_level_reasoning: The 'define' verb indicates the role sets strategy and direction for the marketing data function rather than executing against predetermined priorities.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Design, build, and maintain our core marketing data models
ai_role_quote: Maintain expertise across marketing tech stack including ad platforms, Airbyte, Zoho CRM, GTM, and web analytics
ai_role_reasoning: Tech stack specified contains no AI tools, GenAI platforms, or AI-building infrastructure.
testing_framing_quote: Take full ownership of the stability of our marketing data pipelines
testing_framing_reasoning: Ownership framed around operational stability and incident response, not defining or implementing testing practices.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: be the first to respond to incidents and drive resolution
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Operational reliability concerns dominate, with emphasis on incident response and pipeline stability.
